title: Complete checkout flow to success confirmation
description: Verifies a buyer can proceed from cart through checkout and payment screens and lands on a success confirmation page.

steps.description: Click the link to view all products
Click a product card from the listing
Add the product to the cart
Click the link to open the cart
Fill valid checkout details into the required fields
Submit the order to proceed to payment
Complete the payment step available in the UI
Verify an order success confirmation is displayed

title: Log in and land in signed-in experience
description: Verifies a user can sign in with valid credentials and sees the app in an authenticated state.

steps.description: Verify the user is signed in and the signed-in navigation options are visible

title: Protected cart route requires login
description: Verifies an unauthenticated visitor is blocked from the cart page and is prompted to log in.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected into the login flow

title: Accessing orders requires authentication
description: Verifies an unauthenticated visitor is redirected to login when attempting to access the orders page.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to log in or lands on the login page

title: Accessing admin area requires authentication
description: Verifies an unauthenticated visitor is redirected to login when attempting to access the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to log in or lands on the login page

title: Add a product to cart and view it in cart
description: Verifies a buyer can add a product to the cart from product detail and sees it present in the cart.

steps.description: Click the link to view all products
Click a product card from the listing
Add the product to the cart
Click the link to open the cart
Verify the cart displays at least one line item

title: Accessing seller operations requires authentication
description: Verifies an unauthenticated visitor is redirected to login when attempting to access a seller-protected page.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to log in or lands on the login page

title: Open a product detail from catalog and see seller summary
description: Verifies a visitor can open a product from the catalog and see product details along with seller summary information.

steps.description: Click a product card from the listing
Verify seller summary information is displayed

title: Update cart item quantity and see totals change
description: Verifies a buyer can change an item quantity in the cart and sees cart totals update accordingly.

steps.description: Click the link to view all products
Click a product card from the listing
Add the product to the cart
Click the link to open the cart
Increase the quantity for the cart line item to a higher valid number
Verify the cart subtotal updates to reflect the new quantity

title: Request a password reset link
description: Verifies a user can request a password reset and sees a confirmation that the reset request was sent.

steps.description: Fill a valid email into the email field
Submit the password reset request form
Verify a reset request confirmation is visible

title: Browse from homepage to full catalog
description: Verifies a visitor can browse featured/latest listings on the homepage and navigate to the full product catalog.

steps.description: Scroll to browse featured and latest product sections
Click the link to view all products
Verify a product catalog list is displayed

title: View buyer orders list
description: Verifies a signed-in buyer can open the orders page and see a list of orders with high-level statuses.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view orders
Verify a list of orders is displayed

title: Search for products by keyword
description: Verifies a visitor can search with keywords and sees a results list for the query.

steps.description: Fill a common keyword into the search field

title: Open an order to view details and timeline
description: Verifies a signed-in buyer can open an order from the orders list and see order details including a timeline/tracking section.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view orders
Click an order from the list to open its details
Verify the order detail view shows order items and a timeline or tracking updates section

title: Filter product catalog by category or sub-category
description: Verifies a visitor can apply a category or sub-category filter and the product list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Select a sub-category filter option if available
Verify the product list updates to reflect the selected filter

title: Remove the last item from cart and see empty cart state
description: Verifies a buyer can remove the only item in the cart and then sees an empty cart state.

steps.description: Click the link to view all products
Click a product card from the listing
Add the product to the cart
Click the link to open the cart
Verify an empty cart state is visible

title: Register a new account
description: Verifies a visitor can create a new account and receives an on-screen confirmation of account creation.

steps.description: Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill matching password into the confirm password field
Fill a valid name into the name field
Verify an account creation confirmation is visible

title: Complete seller onboarding to success confirmation
description: Verifies a signed-in user can complete seller onboarding and reach a success confirmation page.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to become a seller
Fill required seller onboarding fields with valid details
Verify a seller registration success confirmation is displayed

title: View admin dashboard metrics
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open the admin dashboard and see operational metrics or summaries displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the admin area
Verify admin dashboard metrics or operational summaries are displayed

title: Confirm receipt for an order from order details
description: Verifies a signed-in buyer can confirm an order as received from the order detail view and see the status updated.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view orders
Click an order from the list to open its details
Click the action to confirm the order was received
Verify the order status is shown as received in the order detail view

title: Create a listing and see it in My Listings
description: Verifies a signed-in seller can create a product listing and then see it appear in their listings.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to create a listing
Fill "Reusable Bottle TC" into the product title field
Fill "Test description for seller listing" into the description field
Select a valid category for the listing
Click the navigation link to view your listings
Verify a listing titled "Reusable Bottle TC" appears in the listings list

title: Cancel an eligible order from the orders list
description: Verifies a signed-in buyer can cancel an eligible order and see the cancellation reflected in the orders list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view orders
Select an order that shows a cancel option
Submit the cancel action for the selected order
Verify a cancellation confirmation is visible or the order shows a cancelled status in the list

title: Moderate a product status from admin products
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can change a product's moderation status and see the updated status reflected in the admin products list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open admin product moderation
Select a product row from the moderation list
Select a different moderation status for the product
Verify the product shows the updated moderation status in the admin products list

title: Edit a listing and see updates reflected
description: Verifies a signed-in seller can edit an existing listing and see the updated details reflected in the listings view.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to create a listing
Fill "Vintage Lamp TC" into the product title field
Fill "Initial description" into the description field
Select a valid category for the listing
Click the navigation link to view your listings
Open the listing titled "Vintage Lamp TC" for editing
Fill "Vintage Lamp TC Updated" into the product title field
Verify a listing titled "Vintage Lamp TC Updated" appears in the listings list

title: Search and disable a user account from admin users
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can search for a user and disable the account with a visible confirmation of the update.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open admin user management
Fill "test" into the user search field
Select a user from the results
Change the account status to disabled and save
Verify an account update confirmation is visible or the user shows as disabled in the results

title: Ineligible order cannot be cancelled
description: Verifies that for an order not eligible for cancellation, the buyer is not offered the cancel action.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view orders
Open an order that does not appear eligible for cancellation
Verify the cancel action is not available for this order

title: Update seller order status from seller orders
description: Verifies a signed-in seller can change the status of an order in the seller orders page and see the updated status reflected.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view seller orders
Select an order from the seller orders list
Select a new valid status for the order
Verify the order shows the newly selected status in the seller orders list

title: View seller payouts records
description: Verifies a signed-in seller can open the payouts page and see wallet or payout records or an empty state.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view seller payouts
Verify payout records are displayed or an empty state is visible

title: Orders empty state is shown when there are no orders
description: Verifies the orders page shows an empty state message when the signed-in buyer has no orders.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view orders
Verify an empty state message is visible when no orders are available

title: Search with no results shows empty state
description: Verifies searching with a rare query shows a clear empty state when no products match.

steps.description: Fill a highly specific keyword unlikely to exist into the search field
Verify a no-results empty state is visible

title: Login validation blocks empty credentials
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission when required fields are empty and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Login validation blocks invalid credentials format
description: Verifies the login form shows validation feedback when credentials are in an invalid format.

steps.description: Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a short or otherwise invalid password into the password field
Verify credential validation errors are visible
